zh.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 聖 勞倫斯。她於1231年與Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 聖 勞倫斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1300年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 聖 勞倫斯。她于1231年与Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾馬爾斯頓 聖 勞倫斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1300年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Marston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous places called Marston or Merston, in counties including Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Isle of Wight, Kent, Northamptonshire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Sussex, and Worcestershire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English mersc ‘marsh’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Marson
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Maston
meanings: Of uncertain origin; a traditional name in aristocratic families of Languedoc, so perhaps an altered form of Gascon, denoting someone from Gascony in Languedoc.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius was born about 1210, in Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth in 1231, in Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1300, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland, Eng: Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius est née environ 1210, à Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth en 1231, à Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland, Eng: Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius wurde um 1210 in Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1231 in Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth nel 1231, nel Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1300, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistariusは約1210年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアマーストン スト ラウレンスで生まれた。1231年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアマーストン スト ラウレンスでSir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで91歳で死去した。

ko.Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 마스턴 스트 로렌스
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius(은)는 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 마스턴 스트 로렌스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 마스턴 스트 로렌스에서 Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth em 1231, em Marston St Lawrence, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos.

ru.Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland, Eng: марстон ст ларенс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Anne Lady Marston Northumberland de Balistarius родилась около 1210 г. в местности марстон ст ларенс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Simon of Marston St Lawrence, Northumberland de SaintElizabeth в 1231 г. в местности марстон ст ларенс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
